name: QA 294
description:
PCP QA Test No. 294

Basic pmproxy functionality



Copyright (c) 2005 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner direct --platform ubuntu1804 reproduce

output mismatch (see 294.out.bad)
1085,1086c1085,1087
< DATE	"hullo world!"
< DATE	"hullo world!"
---
> [DATE] pmdumptext(PID) Warning: __pmConnectPMCD: bad version string from pmproxy: ""
> pmdumptext: Error: MY_HOSTNAME: IPC protocol failure
> pmdumptext: no valid metrics, exiting.

< DATE	N	N	N
< DATE	N	N	N
---

> pmdumptext: no valid metrics, exiting.

< @ DATE
